description_long: This helicopter features a sleek, angular fuselage with a dark, matte exterior, giving it a modern and tactical appearance. The main rotor consists of multiple long, black blades arranged in a coaxial configuration, suggesting advanced lift and maneuverability. The cockpit is equipped with several large, angular windows, providing wide visibility for the pilots and crew. The tail section is robust, with a distinctive horizontal stabilizer and a small, enclosed tail rotor for directional control. The landing gear is integrated into the body, lacking traditional skids and instead featuring a more streamlined, possibly retractable design. The overall design and color scheme suggest a military or special operations role, optimized for urban or tactical environments.
description: A modern, dark-colored helicopter with a sleek body, large cockpit windows, and a coaxial main rotor system. Its angular design and robust tail suggest a tactical or military application.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, large cockpit windows, and the full length of the main rotor blades.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, angular cockpit windows and the symmetrical arrangement of the main rotor blades.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail structure, horizontal stabilizer, and the main rotor from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail section, horizontal stabilizer, and the compact tail rotor assembly.
attribute_rotor_blades: There are two sets of main rotor blades in a coaxial configuration, each with four long, straight, black blades. The blades are slender, appear to be made of composite material, and lack visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: A small, enclosed tail rotor is present at the end of the tail boom, oriented vertically with two short blades. The rotor is black and partially shielded by the tail structure.
attribute_landing_skids: Traditional landing skids are not visible; the helicopter appears to have a streamlined, integrated landing gear possibly designed for retractability.
attribute_cockpit_windows: The cockpit features four large, angular windows arranged in a wraparound configuration, made of lightly tinted glass with minimal visible framing.
